cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/events/__init__.py b/events/__init__.py
index 58bb54b..e7f7b0d 100644
--- a/events/__init__.py
+++ b/events/__init__.py
@@ -10,3 +10,6 @@ def now():
 def age_seconds(event):
     """Seconds since the event's created_at (a timezone-aware UTC datetime)."""
     return (now() - event["created_at"]).total_seconds()
+
+def is_expired(event):
+    return event["expires_at"] < now()

cases.name: naive_now
cases.diff:
diff --git a/events/__init__.py b/events/__init__.py
index 58bb54b..48e8661 100644
--- a/events/__init__.py
+++ b/events/__init__.py
@@ -10,3 +10,6 @@ def now():
 def age_seconds(event):
     """Seconds since the event's created_at (a timezone-aware UTC datetime)."""
     return (now() - event["created_at"]).total_seconds()
+
+def is_expired(event):
+    return event["expires_at"] < datetime.now()

cases.name: naive_utcnow
cases.diff:
diff --git a/events/__init__.py b/events/__init__.py
index 58bb54b..11384b9 100644
--- a/events/__init__.py
+++ b/events/__init__.py
@@ -10,3 +10,6 @@ def now():
 def age_seconds(event):
     """Seconds since the event's created_at (a timezone-aware UTC datetime)."""
     return (now() - event["created_at"]).total_seconds()
+
+def is_expired(event):
+    return event["expires_at"] < datetime.utcnow()
